scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$ids = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002,5176 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($ids) { Get-Process -Id $ids -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force }"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev --prefix client"
